description_long: This is a large, industrial yellow bulldozer with a robust steel frame and a wide, black front blade designed for heavy-duty earthmoving tasks. The vehicle features four oversized, rugged tires with deep treads for traction on rough terrain, and a spacious, enclosed operator cabin with large windows for visibility. The front blade is reinforced with metal teeth along the lower edge, ideal for breaking up and pushing debris or soil. The cabin is accessed by a small ladder and is protected by a sturdy roll-over protection structure. The rear of the bulldozer is streamlined, with visible engine housing and exhaust components. The overall design emphasizes durability, power, and operator safety, making it suitable for demanding urban construction environments.
description: A heavy-duty yellow bulldozer with a wide, toothed black blade, large rugged tires, and an enclosed operator cabin with protective structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, black blade with metal teeth and the central operator cabin behind it.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large tires, side ladder, and the full length of the blade and cabin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine housing, rear tires, and the back of the cabin.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blade, tires, and cabin access.
attribute_blade_type: straight blade (S-blade); the blade is wide, flat, and lacks pronounced side wings, suitable for fine grading.
attribute_track_type: Tire-based (wheeled) system; the bulldozer uses four large, deep-treaded rubber tires instead of tracks, providing mobility on urban surfaces.
attribute_cabin_design: The cabin is fully enclosed with large glass windows for visibility and features a roll-over protection structure (ROPS) for operator safety. Access is provided by a side ladder, and the design prioritizes comfort and control accessibility.
attribute_exhaust_placement: Vertical stack located on the right side of the cabin, extending upward.
